chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3351 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.16561/2023 2. For hearing of CMA No.15799/2023 3. For hearing of main case 23.05.2025 Mr. Mansoor Ali Ghangro, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Zubair Bilal, Chief Commissioner LTO, Karachi Mr. Shabih ul Aijaz, Commissioner I.R. LTO, Karachi The subject matter herein was denial of benefit of double taxation treaty. Mr. Zubair Bilal, Chief Commissioner LTO, Karachi and Mr. Shabih ul Aijaz, Commissioner I.R. LTO, Karachi, are present and state that the order of the Chief Commissioner dated 11.05.2023 is being recalled forthwith. It is stated that the petitioner shall be given an opportunity of hearing whereafter the deliberation of the application will be conducted denovo and speaking order shall be passed. It is further stated that pending the foregoing no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. In view hereof petitioner’s counsel is satisfied and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of learned officers is appreciated and dispensed with. Judge Judge Amjad
